2606.09551.title: FuseFSS: Efficient Secure LLM Inference with Function Secret Sharing
2606.09551.paper_summary: Two-server secure inference allows a client to query a hosted large language model (LLM) without revealing prompts or embeddings. Recent GPU systems based on function secret sharing (FSS) make linear layers efficient, but fixed-point nonlinearities and helper operations remain a bottleneck because each operator is typically implemented as a bespoke protocol with its own comparisons, wrap-around corrections, and preprocessing material. We present FuseFSS, a compiler that replaces per-operator protocol design with a single compilation pipeline. For each scalar fixed-point operator, a compact specification lists its interval partition, low-degree arithmetic pieces, and required predicate bits. The compiler emits two batched FSS evaluations on the public masked value: one packed comparison that returns all predicate bits, and one vector interval lookup that returns the active coefficients and constants. Compared to the current state-of-the-art FSS-based GPU secure inference, FuseFSS preserves accuracy while achieving a $1.24\times$--$1.50\times$ end-to-end speedup and reducing online communication by $9\%$--$16\%$ on BERT and GPT-style models; preprocessing is also lighter, with $14\%$--$23\%$ lower key-generation time and $20\%$--$24\%$ smaller keys.
2606.09551.paper_summary_zh: 兩伺服器安全推論允許客戶端查詢託管的大型語言模型（LLM），而不透露提示或嵌入。最近基於函數秘密共享（FSS）的GPU系統使得線性層的效率提高，但固定點非線性和輔助操作仍然是瓶頸，因為每個運算子通常被實現為具有自己比較、回繞修正和預處理材料的定制協議。我們提出了FuseFSS，一個將每個運算子的協議設計替換為單一編譯管道的編譯器。對於每個標量固定點運算子，一個緊湊的規範列出了其區間劃分、低階算術片段和所需的謂詞位元。編譯器在公共遮罩值上發出兩個批次的FSS評估：一個打包比較返回所有謂詞位元，另一個向量區間查找返回活躍的係數和常數。與當前最先進的基於FSS的GPU安全推論相比，FuseFSS在保持準確性的同時實現了$1.24\times$--$1.50\times$的端到端加速，並在BERT和GPT風格模型上將在線通信減少了$9\%$--$16\%$；預處理也更輕，密鑰生成時間降低了$14\%$--$23\%$，密鑰大小減少了$20\%$--$24\%$。
2606.09551.author: Yuhan Ma et.al.
2606.09551.authors: Yuhan Ma, Yong Li, Stefan Schmid
